## Lab or exercise

Which lab or exercise?

```text
path/to/file.md
```

## Goal

What should students learn?

## Current gap

What is missing or weak today?

## Proposed lab change

Describe the new or improved lab activity.

## Safety boundaries

Confirm the lab remains safe and controlled:

- [ ] Uses fake/local data
- [ ] Does not target third-party systems
- [ ] Does not require real credentials
- [ ] Has clear rules of engagement
- [ ] Includes defensive learning, not only exploitation
